mapper.sql: CASE WHEN UPPER(p.status) IN ('CANCELED', 'CANCELLED') THEN 'CANCELED' ELSE UPPER(p.status) END
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.schedule_id AS scheduleId, AS status, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM participation p WHERE p.id = #{participationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.schedule_id AS scheduleId, AS status, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM participation p INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND p.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO participation ( user_id, schedule_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{scheduleId}, #{status.databaseValue}, NOW() )
mapper.sql: s.id AS schedule_id, p.id AS participation_id, s.category AS category, s.title AS title, COALESCE(s.region, '') AS location, si.image_url AS thumbnail, s.start_date AS start_date, s.end_date AS end_date, s.recruit_end_date AS recruit_end_date, s.current_participants AS current_people, s.max_participants AS max_people, AS db_status, s.status AS schedule_status, FALSE AS host, 'participant' AS my_role
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM participation p INNER JOIN schedule s ON s.id = p.schedule_id LEFT JOIN schedule_image si ON si.schedule_id = s.id AND si.is_thumbnail = 1 WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND s.user_id != #{userId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND (s.end_date IS NULL OR s.end_date >= CURDATE()) AND IN
#{status}
ORDER BY s.start_date ASC, p.id DESC

SELECT s.id AS schedule_id, NULL AS participation_id, s.category AS category, s.title AS title, COALESCE(s.region, '') AS location, si.image_url AS thumbnail, s.start_date AS start_date, s.end_date AS end_date, s.recruit_end_date AS recruit_end_date, s.current_participants AS current_people, s.max_participants AS max_people, s.status AS db_status, s.status AS schedule_status, TRUE AS host, 'host' AS my_role FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN schedule_image si ON si.schedule_id = s.id AND si.is_thumbnail = 1 WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.start_date ASC, s.id DESC
SELECT AS status FROM participation p INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND u.email = #{email} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1
